description: Case diameter: 45 mm Case thickness: 10 mmDial shape: RoundSteel squarish case with a fixed bezel for added durability, style and comfortBlack leather strap with a tang clasp for comfort and styleWhite coloured dial brand logo at the 12 hour mark and branding around the dial Quartz movement of time display Screw to reset timeSolid case back made of stainless steel for enhanced durabilityWater resistant up to 50 meters allowing you to use it when washing your hands or in light rain
